base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of story_intro_scrolling_text — a ui (cutscene) from 1986 legend of zelda. Scrolling intro text — 'MANY YEARS AGO PRINCE DARKNESS GANNON STOLE ONE OF THE TRIFORCES WITH POWER...' narrated story between title-loops. Rendered in cyan/orange pixel-font. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Scrolling intro text — 'MANY YEARS AGO PRINCE DARKNESS GANNON STOLE ONE OF THE TRIFORCES WITH POWER...' narrated story between title-loops. Rendered in cyan/orange pixel-font
